column1: # RAG grounding type-diversity cases (eval/evalkit RunRAGDiversity,
# `pixkb eval rag-diversity`). Format: id<TAB>question<TAB>min-distinct-types.
# UNLIKE every other case file in this plan, these questions were NOT
# live-verified during authoring — rag.Ask spends a real subscription-agent
# turn per case (same cost as eval/run-rag-judge.sh), so verification is
# deferred to this task's own Step 5 (run once, on purpose, and record the
# actual numbers here as a comment or in the task report). min-types is a
# starting expectation, not a proven baseline — adjust after the first run
# if the actual diversity differs, and say so in the task report rather than
# silently editing the number to make it pass.
# 2026-07-04 follow-up (see docs/BACKLOG.md): the first live run reported
# types=[] for both cases. Root cause was retrieval, not citation-matching —
# diversity-devolucao-fluxo's original wording ("quais os passos e regras
# para tratar a devolução de um Pix, desde a chamada de API até a mensagem
# interbancária envolvida?") is long enough that websearch_to_tsquery's
# implicit AND-of-all-terms (internal/store/postgres/search.go's FTS) matched
# zero concepts, leaving the hashing embedder's weak, punctuation-sensitive
# vector arm (internal/embed/hashing.go hashes raw character 3-grams, not
# tokens) to surface unrelated institutional pages. Reworded to name the
# concrete devolução endpoint + pacs.004 message the KB actually indexes;
# verified live (--provider claude) after the reword: 2 distinct types
# (ApiEndpoint, Reference), min-types=2 met.
# diversity-cobranca-fluxo's original wording was left unchanged — a live
# rerun (2026-07-04) got 2 distinct types (ApiEndpoint, Reference) cleanly;
# its earlier types=[] is attributed to single-sample answerer variance on
# borderline-relevant grounding (retrieval itself is deterministic and
# already surfaces the right two concepts in the top ranks), not a
# retrieval or citation-matching bug. Known limitation: this eval spends one
# live agent turn per case with no retry, so an occasional answerer refusal
# on borderline grounding can still register as a false failure.
diversity-devolucao-fluxo
column2: Passos da devolução de um Pix, do endpoint de devolução até a mensagem pacs.004 no SPI?

column1: diversity-cobranca-fluxo
column2: como funciona o ciclo de uma cobrança com vencimento, da criação via API até a liquidação no SPI?
